basics.name: modelDeploymentName
basics.label: Chat model deployment name
basics.toolTip: Foundry chat model deployment name, surfaced to the app as FOUNDRY_MODEL. Keep the secure default unless your subscription requires a different deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: 1-64 characters: letters, numbers, dot, underscore or hyphen.

options.text: Optional. Provide an Entra tenant + backend API app registration if you want the backend to call downstream APIs On-Behalf-Of the signed-in user. Leave blank to deploy without OBO.

elements.name: entraTenantId
elements.label: Entra tenant ID
elements.toolTip: Directory (tenant) ID used for backend OBO. Leave blank to disable OBO.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a GUID, or blank.

elements.name: entraApiClientId
elements.label: Backend API client ID
elements.toolTip: App registration (client) ID of the backend API used for OBO. Leave blank to disable OBO.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a GUID, or blank.

elements.name: entraApiClientSecret
elements.toolTip: Client secret for the backend API app registration (OBO). Leave blank to disable OBO.
